brand.name: Cape Ember Coffee Co.
brand.feeling: Premium, Luxury, Warm, Modern, Elegant, Minimal, South African, Artisan, Freshly Roasted

rules: No pure black or pure white. Always tint to warm earthy Karoo tones.
Ensure WCAG AA contrast for text.
Use #D05C23 strictly for interactive CTAs and core accents.

layout_and_spacing.system: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-32) for a luxurious, uncrowded feel.
layout_and_spacing.grid_protocol: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID. Asymmetrical bento grids with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leave negative space for breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-first approach. Optical alignment. Headings are elegantly aligned to complement layout balance.

components_and_features.header: Premium sticky header (shrinks on scroll). Crystal glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-[#FDFBF7]/80. Bottom border border-[#E6DCD1]/50. Includes Nav, Search, Account, Wishlist, Cart.
components_and_features.logo_rules: CRITICAL: Flame logo to the left, 'Cape Ember Coffee Co.' text to the right, professionally spaced, vertically centered. NEVER place logo inside a black square.
components_and_features.hero_section: Immersive parallax hero banner using the roasting_story or hero_banner media. Gradient overlay max bg-black/30 so the image breathes.
components_and_features.product_pages: Large image gallery with zoom, roast profile visualizer, strength meter, tasting notes, and reviews.
components_and_features.collections: Advanced filtering sidebar. Minimalist product cards without harsh shadows. Focus on the coffee bags.
components_and_features.checkout_accounts: Premium checkout flow, wishlist tracking, and customer accounts natively integrated.

interactions_and_animations.hover_states: All buttons must have explicit hover states altering text/bg color contrast. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
interactions_and_animations.motion: Use Framer Motion for smooth, unhurried fade-ins. Setup Lenis for buttery momentum scrolling.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' is applied for headings and 'Outfit' for body text.
Implement `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based) on all interactive UI elements.
Install and use '@phosphor-icons/react' for elegant, high-end duotone icons.
Do NOT build generic Shopify-like rows. Embrace asymmetric grids and editorial layouts.
Rely ONLY on the provided media_urls. Do not use placeholder services.
Respect the logo rule strictly: Flame left, text right, vertically centered, NO black square container.
